title: Hanch, A Schoolmaster. Epig.
content:
Hanch, since he lately did inter his wife,
    He weeps and sighs, as weary of his life.
    Say, is't for real grief he mourns? not so;
    Tears have their springs from joy, as well as woe.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Hanch, A Schoolmaster. Epig."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
